versions.version_description: This version includes lots of little details. I included the ornamental passing chords in the intro/sax lick and verses, plus put the correct chords into the chorus.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Brass part notes = c  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] -  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch] -  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]


[Intro Brass] 8 bars


[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
The heat is on, on the street[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
Inside your head, on every beat[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
And the beat's so loud, deep inside[/tab]
[tab]                                    [ch]G[/ch]
The pressure's high, just to stay alive[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause the heat is on[/tab]

[brass]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Caught up in the action I've been looking out for you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G[/ch]                           [ch]D[/ch]
The heat is on Oh it's on the street, the heat is  "1234"  on[/tab]

[brass]


[Solo] 
8 bars  D


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Oh-wo-ho, oh-wo-ho[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]
Tell me can you feel it[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
The heat is on, the heat is on, the heat is on[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Oh it's on the street, the heat is  "1234" on[/tab]



[Verse]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]              
The shadows are on the darker side[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Behind those doors, it's a wilder ride[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
You can make a break, you can win or lose[/tab]
[tab]                                              [ch]G[/ch]
That's a chance you take, when the heat's on you[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
When the heat is on[/tab]

NO BRASS


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]

It's on the street[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D[/ch]
